claim: AI coding assistants lack real-time library documentation, causing them to generate outdated or non-existent API calls
actionable: For coding agents using newer libraries, implement RAG or agent-based documentation fetching to augment LLM knowledge
source_title: Claude Computer Use + Bolt.new - The ULTIMATE AI Coding Combo?

claim: Claude Computer Use API can be used to research documentation and inject findings into code generation prompts as RAG
actionable: Use Computer Use API to fetch documentation before prompting a code generation tool, augmenting its context with current APIs
source_title: Claude Computer Use + Bolt.new - The ULTIMATE AI Coding Combo?

claim: Combining agent research (Computer Use) with code generation tools (Bolt.new) enables hands-off AI development workflows
actionable: Chain agents that research documentation with agents that generate code to reduce manual handholding
source_title: Claude Computer Use + Bolt.new - The ULTIMATE AI Coding Combo?

claim: Correcting agent mistakes mid-execution is faster than waiting for full completion before fixing, even with experimental tools
actionable: Monitor and interrupt agent execution early; small corrections mid-stream beat full rewrites
source_title: Claude Computer Use + Bolt.new - The ULTIMATE AI Coding Combo?
